appraisal.description: A tarnished silver coin whose face reflects a room one second out of sync.

clues.result: The stamped date repeats backward along the rim when viewed through the lens.
UV light reveals a second set of initials floating above the coin face.
The coin chills the table in a perfect circle while the air stays warm.

appraisal.wrong_handling_consequence: If released, the coin returns in a locked till with tomorrow's receipt folded underneath.

generation.concept_prompt: Local prototype concept for Mirror Coin.
generation.model_prompt: Local procedural prototype model for Mirror Coin.
